author: nero_eth
content: There has been an RIP to standardize L2 precompile address space. But apart from that, I think a random address or 0x7997 would be fine too.

author: nero_eth
content: What if we'd instead just have an EIP that says "Arachnid must be put into the genesis file", done, no-op on mainnet.

author: jochembrouwer
content: Oh right this is likely even better 😄

author: jochembrouwer
content: I like this one, no-op for mainnet and fork EIP for L2s or state that it should be part of genesis. So all modes: genesis, tx deployment (this could fail due to gas schedule -> fail = OOG, tx gets included) or insertion. There will be no insertion on L1 but will be possible if an other chain follows
